commit_scope: Carry native mutation trust as a Form-native envelope with prediction residual, choice markers, side-effect intents, and reversible gate state.

commands: cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_native_mutation_route_bindings.py tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py tests/test_application_graph_response_projection.py tests/test_specs_source_native_route.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py

cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_native_mutation_route_bindings.py tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py tests/test_application_graph_response_projection.py tests/test_specs_source_native_route.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py
local_validation.summary: native-mutation-trust-envelope.fk defines a reusable Form envelope that returns choice_success=1, silence/protocol/fail/stop/BMA markers, prediction_error=carried_as_residual, side-effect intents, and a reversible gate that keeps ordinary traffic unflipped. production-routes.fk embeds the same envelope in method-specific native mutation preview responses. mutation_ab_observation_harness.py now treats the envelope as part of the B-arm contract and recommends native side-effect execution plus a narrow reversible public gate as the next evidence.

known_limitations.observed: No ordinary no-header POST/PATCH/DELETE mutation traffic moved. X-Form-Native-Preview remains required for the native preview arm.
Cache invalidation, parent-edge repair, contributor-key audit, and rollback receipt are carried as intents in the envelope; they are not executed natively in this slice.
Prediction error is carried as response residual rather than ignored. The envelope does not claim numeric trust-model certainty.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push of the native mutation trust envelope commit and GitHub checks on PR #2586.

deploy_validation.notes: No public deploy attempted. This slice intentionally keeps the public front-door flip blocked.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Explicit preview mutation responses now include a trust envelope. The public routes still fan out to FastAPI by default, while the preview arm carries residual, side-effect intent, and rollback state natively.
test_flows: Variant B with X-Form-Native-Preview must include trust_envelope.prediction_error=carried_as_residual
Variant B must include choice_success=1 plus silence fanout-default, protocol X-Form-Native-Preview, fail rollback-to-fanout, stop ordinary-traffic-unflipped, and bma native-mutation-trust-envelope
Variant B must include side-effect intents for cache-invalidation, parent-edge-repair, and contributor-key-audit
Variant B must include reversible_gate default_route fanout-python and ordinary_traffic_flip_allowed/performed false

python3 deploy/kernel-router/mutation_ab_observation_harness.py --json -> 5/5 cases passed, confidence 1.0, all envelope checks true, ordinary_traffic_flip_allowed false, ordinary_traffic_flip_performed false

cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_native_mutation_route_bindings.py tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py tests/test_application_graph_response_projection.py tests/test_specs_source_native_route.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py -> 29 passed

phase_gate.reason: Trust envelope parity is complete for preview responses; public mutable traffic still waits for native side-effect execution and a narrow reversible gate with rollback receipt.
